items.source: 01_覆满苔藓和地衣的花岗岩像森林里一位沉默的老者.png
items.title: 覆满苔藓和地衣的花岗岩像森林里一位沉默的老者
items.description: 石头不是静物，它像一段比人类更慢也更久的时间。
items.prompt: Hyper-realistic macro nature photograph of a majestic weather-beaten granite monolith covered in vibrant green moss and ancient lichens, set on the misty floor of an old-growth pine forest at early morning, soft diffused golden light filtering through the dense canopy, ethereal god rays illuminating crystalline stone textures and delicate moss details, serene ancient reverent mood, intimate yet grand natural portrait, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 02_新断面的黑曜石在熔岩红光里像一块刚冷却的危险玻璃.png
items.title: 新断面的黑曜石在熔岩红光里像一块刚冷却的危险玻璃
items.description: 锋利的黑曜石把自然的暴烈和精密同时摆在了眼前。
items.prompt: Epic fantasy concept art matte painting of a raw freshly fractured obsidian rock with sharp conchoidal fractures and a glassy reflective surface, resting on volcanic ash near a flowing river of molten lava, primordial volcanic landscape under a stormy twilight sky, fiery orange and red lava glow casting dramatic high-contrast shadows and highlighting sharp edges and vitreous luster, powerful dangerous creation-energy atmosphere, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 03_被风雕成波浪曲线的砂岩在金色时刻像一片凝固的海.png
items.title: 被风雕成波浪曲线的砂岩在金色时刻像一片凝固的海
items.description: 一整片沙漠的风，最后都像被收进了这块石头的褶皱里。
items.prompt: Breathtaking wide-angle landscape photograph of a massive undulating sandstone formation sculpted by wind into smooth flowing curves like a petrified wave, set in a vast remote desert at golden hour, low warm sun casting long soft shadows, rich terracotta orange and deep red layers emphasized, serene timeless monumental beauty, cinematic composition, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 04_裂开的紫水晶晶洞像一座在地下发光的秘密小教堂.png
items.title: 裂开的紫水晶晶洞像一座在地下发光的秘密小教堂
items.description: 当晶体自己发光时，石头突然像会做梦的建筑。
items.prompt: High-fantasy digital painting of the interior of a giant split-open amethyst geode forming a mystical crystal-lined cave, a small clear pool on the floor reflecting dazzling crystalline structures, hidden underground cavern setting, countless amethyst crystals emitting a soft pulsating bioluminescent glow in deep purple violet and lilac, ethereal enchanting atmosphere focused on magical interplay of light crystal and reflection, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 05_一片蓝纹玛瑙被日光反照得像手里托着一小块流动的河.png
items.title: 一片蓝纹玛瑙被日光反照得像手里托着一小块流动的河
items.description: 玛瑙里的纹路像把水流和云层都封进了矿物内部。
items.prompt: Dreamlike shallow-depth-of-field macro photograph of a polished slice of blue lace agate held delicately, revealing intricate translucent bands of soft blue white and subtle lavender, background of a gently flowing crystal-clear stream with smooth dark river stones beneath the surface, bright natural daylight backlighting the agate so it glows from within and reveals delicate internal patterns, calm clarity and natural elegance, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 06_海边被海浪磨圆的鹅卵石在退潮水痕里像一群被时间驯服的骨头.png
items.title: 海边被海浪磨圆的鹅卵石在退潮水痕里像一群被时间驯服的骨头
items.description: 圆润不是温和，而是无数次冲刷之后留下的耐心。
items.prompt: Poetic macro coastal photograph of smooth sea-worn pebbles clustered on wet sand at low tide, reflective water traces and soft overcast light revealing polished surfaces, muted blue-gray palette, intimate natural texture study, calm contemplative mood, close framing that makes the pebbles feel ancient and bodily, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 07_一块剖开的孔雀石横截面像把绿色风暴冻在了矿物内部.png
items.title: 一块剖开的孔雀石横截面像把绿色风暴冻在了矿物内部
items.description: 矿石内部的旋纹，比很多抽象画都更有控制不住的力量。
items.prompt: Striking macro studio photograph of a cut malachite stone cross-section, vivid swirling bands of deep emerald and black-green frozen inside polished mineral layers, glossy surface catching controlled highlights, dark museum backdrop, ultra-detailed texture, dramatic elegant composition, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 08_峡谷岩壁上的铁锈色纹层在夕光里像一页被烧过的地质档案.png
items.title: 峡谷岩壁上的铁锈色纹层在夕光里像一页被烧过的地质档案
items.description: 岩层不是背景，它本身就像大地留下的手写记录。
items.prompt: Cinematic landscape-detail photograph of stratified canyon rock wall with rust, ochre, and dark mineral bands glowing in late sunset light, tactile geological layers like a burned archive page, shallow telephoto compression, dramatic natural texture emphasis, warm dry atmosphere, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 月光下的白色石英脉从黑色山体里像一道冷光伤口一样裂开
items.description: 石英的明亮像一种伤口，也像地壳深处迟来的回答。
items.prompt: Atmospheric night landscape image of a bright white quartz vein cutting through dark mountain rock under pale moonlight, stark contrast between luminous mineral and matte black stone, mysterious alpine stillness, cool blue-gray tones, highly textured surfaces, elegant dramatic framing, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 一枚带化石纹理的石灰岩在掌心里像托着一小块失语的海洋
items.description: 掌心里的化石纹路，让远古海洋第一次有了可以触碰的重量。
items.prompt: Naturalistic close-up photograph of a hand holding a pale limestone stone etched with delicate fossil textures and shell impressions, soft daylight revealing chalky surface and tiny embedded histories, intimate human-scale composition, calm museum-meets-field-study mood, shallow depth of field, no logos, no readable text.
